lines: +# Committed generated ui-templates output; pin LF so regeneration on any OS diffs cleanly.
+    # Regenerates the committed @nuxt/ui-templates output and fails on drift.
+      - name: Fail if committed output is stale
+            echo "::error::Committed ui-templates output is out of date. Run 'pnpm --filter @nuxt/ui-templates build' and commit the result."
+          echo "Committed ui-templates output is up to date."
+        run: gh run cancel ${{ github.run_id }} --repo ${{ github.repository }}
import { NUXT_BUILD_OUTPUT_MAP, distDir, getLayerNodeModulesExcludePattern, getSsrResolveConditions, toArray } from './utils.ts'
// TODO: figure out a good way to share this
+// This file is generated by @nuxt/ui-templates and committed to the repository.
+// Do not edit it directly: edit the source in packages/ui-templates/templates/
+export type DefaultMessages = Record<"appName" | "status" | "statusText" | "description" | "refresh", string | boolean | number >
+const _messages = {"appName":"Nuxt","status":500,"statusText":"Internal server error","description":"This page is temporarily unavailable.","refresh":"Refresh this page"}

+ return "" + escapeHtml(messages.status) + " - " + escapeHtml(messages.statusText) + " | " + escapeHtml(messages.appName) + "

" + escapeHtml(messages.status) + "

" + escapeHtml(messages.statusText) + "

" + escapeHtml(messages.description) + "

"
\ No newline at end of file
